title: Oramed Pharmaceuticals to Join Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Indexes
author: Prnewswire
description: Oramed Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: ORMP) announced it will be added to the Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® indexes following the 2026 semi-annual reconstitution, effective June 29, 2026. The inclusion is based on the company's market capitalization ranking as of April 30, 2026, and will provide automatic inclusion in appropriate growth and value style indexes.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Inclusion in major Russell indexes is generally viewed positively as it increases visibility to institutional investors, typically leads to increased trading volume and liquidity, and validates the company's market position. Index inclusion often results in passive fund inflows as index funds rebalance to include the newly added security.

title: Lifeward Receives Shareholder Approval to Close on Strategic Partnership with Oramed—Creating Diversified Biomedical Company
author: Na
description: Lifeward Ltd. announced shareholder approval for a strategic partnership with Oramed Pharmaceuticals, integrating Oramed's POD™ oral delivery technology platform. The deal provides Lifeward with up to $47 million in capital while allowing the company to diversify from its core medical technology business into biotechnology. Oramed will manage and fund the POD™ platform's clinical development, while Lifeward maintains focus on profitability from its existing ReWalk® and AlterG® product lines.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Shareholder approval of strategic partnership provides up to $47 million in capital, diversifies business into biotechnology, maintains focus on profitable core business, and positions company for long-term growth with reduced financial risk through Oramed's funding of clinical development.

Gains significant equity ownership in Lifeward through shares and warrants, retains control of POD™ platform clinical development, and gains exposure to established medical technology revenue streams while maintaining focus on its oral insulin therapy development.

title: Oramed Receives $18 Million Payment from Scilex Holdings, Bringing Current Returns to $118 Million; Board Approves Dividend Payments
author: Prnewswire
description: Oramed Pharmaceuticals received an $18 million payment from Scilex Holdings, closing out option agreement obligations and bringing total returns to $118 million on its original $99.5 million investment. The company's board approved a $0.25 per share cash dividend (~$10.5 million aggregate) to be paid on January 26, 2026. Oramed retains $39 million in outstanding debt, convertible notes, warrants, and royalty interests with Scilex.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Company received substantial $18 million payment closing obligations, achieved $118 million returns on $99.5 million investment (19% gain), approved shareholder dividend of $0.25/share, and retains significant remaining assets ($39 million) including convertible notes and royalty interests, demonstrating strong financial performance and shareholder returns.

Scilex made a required $18 million payment to satisfy option agreement obligations. While this represents a cash outflow, it is a contractual obligation being fulfilled. The company retains ongoing relationships with Oramed through remaining debt, convertible notes, and royalty arrangements, indicating continued business ties.

title: ORAMED PHARMACEUTICALS INC. DECLARES DIVIDEND DISTRIBUTION OF COMMON STOCK PURCHASE RIGHTS
author: Prnewswire
description: Oramed Pharmaceuticals announced a Rights Plan to protect against hostile takeovers, distributing one common stock purchase right per outstanding share, with rights becoming exercisable if a person/group acquires 15% or more of outstanding stock.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company is implementing a defensive strategy to protect shareholders by establishing a rights plan that ensures fair treatment in potential acquisition scenarios, without indicating immediate positive or negative business performance

title: Oramed Announces Transformative Joint Venture to Accelerate Development and Commercialization of Oral Insulin
author: Prnewswire
description: Oramed Pharmaceuticals announced a joint venture with Hefei Tianhui Biotech to accelerate the development and commercialization of its oral insulin and other oral drug delivery technologies. The new company, OraTech Pharmaceuticals, will receive significant financial backing and leverage HTIT's manufacturing capabilities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Oramed's transformative joint venture with HTIT, which is designed to accelerate the development and commercialization of its oral insulin and other oral drug delivery technologies. This suggests Oramed is making strategic moves to advance its core business.
